rules_initial.example_text: On October 12, 2023, the New York Rangers faced off against the Toronto Maple Leafs at Madison Square Garden. The Rangers won the match 4-2. Artemi Panarin scored a power-play goal, assisted by Adam Fox. Meanwhile, Toronto's Chris Tanev was sent to the box for 2 minutes for hooking.
guidelines: Create a unique identifier for each match (e.g., Match_YYYY_MM_DD_TeamA_TeamB) to serve as the central node for match-level attributes.
Use 'scored_goal' to link a player to the specific match occurrence.
The 'assisted_by' predicate should link the goal scorer to the assisting player.
Normalize team names to their official full titles (e.g., 'NYR' to 'New York Rangers').
Extract penalty duration as a numeric value for 'served_penalty_minutes'.
Scores should be formatted as 'X-Y' strings.

rules_final.example_text: On October 12, 2023, the New York Rangers faced off against the Toronto Maple Leafs at Madison Square Garden. The Rangers won the match 4-2. In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Spartak Moscow defeated Avtomobilist Yekaterinburg 4-1.
guidelines: Create a unique identifier for each match (e.g., Match_YYYY_MM_DD_TeamA_TeamB) to serve as the central node for match-level attributes.
Use 'winner' to link the match identifier to the winning team.
Use 'part_of_season' and 'part_of_round' to capture the league scheduling context of the match.
Use 'scored_goal' to link a player to the specific match occurrence.
The 'assisted_by' predicate should link the goal scorer to the assisting player.
Normalize team names to their official full titles.
Extract penalty duration as a numeric value for 'served_penalty_minutes'.
Scores should be formatted as 'X-Y' strings.

rules_revision_history.reason: The text contains a team victory/defeat relationship and a specific match round/season that are not covered by the provided predicates.
rule_gaps: No predicate to capture the winner/loser of a match (e.g., 'defeated_by' or 'winner').
No predicate to capture the match round or season (e.g., 'part_of_round' or 'season').

generated_text_by_instance.text: In an NHL 23/24 regular season game, the Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Columbus Blue Jackets 3-2. Both teams remained scoreless through the first two periods, with all scoring occurring in the third period.

In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Spartak Moscow defeated Avtomobilist Yekaterinburg 4-1. After a scoreless first period, Spartak took control with two goals in both the second and third periods, while Avtomobilist managed only a single goal in the final frame.

In a Russian MHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan 4-3. After a 3-3 draw in normal time—with Irbis Kazan dominating the first period 3-1 and Stalnye Lisy recovering in the third—Stalnye Lisy secured the win via a penalty shootout.
In round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, Mora IK secured a dominant 6-0 victory over Almtuna IS, scoring two goals in the second period and four in the third.
In the MHL 23/24 season, Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan 5-3. Stalnye Lisy maintained a lead throughout most of the game, starting strong with 2 goals in the first period.
In round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season, Falu IF defeated Mariestads BOIS 5-4 after overtime, following a 4-4 tie in regulation time.

In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League in Austria, HC TWK Innsbruck defeated EC VSV 3-2. Innsbruck overcame a slow start (0-1 in the first period) to score three unanswered goals across the second and third periods.

In round 22 of the Polish Ice Hockey Ekstraliga (23/24 season), GKS Tychy defeated Unia Oświęcim 5-4. After a scoreless first period, GKS Tychy secured the win by outscoring Oświęcim 3-2 in the final period.
In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga 23/24 season, TAURON Podhale Nowy Targ dominated JKH GKS Jastrzębie with a 10-3 victory, fueled by a decisive 7-0 surge in the second period.
In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Vityaz Podolsk defeated Barys Astana 5-2, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.

The Bridgeport Islanders defeated the Belleville Senators 4-2 in an AHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey game. After a scoreless first period, Bridgeport dominated the second with three goals to secure their victory.

In a KHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, Traktor Chelyabinsk defeated Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod 2-1. Traktor secured the win with goals in the first and third periods, while Torpedo managed a single goal in the final period.
In round 24 of the ICE Hockey League 23/24, the Graz 99ers defeated the Vienna Capitals 4-3 after overtime, following a 3-3 tie in regulation time.

In round 1 of the SDHL 23/24 season, Modo Hockey defeated Leksands IF 3-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-0 lead for Leksands in the second, Modo Hockey secured the victory with three goals in the third period.
In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga (23/24 season), Tauron KH GKS Katowice dominated Comarch Cracovia with a 7-2 victory, largely driven by a strong 5-0 performance in the first period.

In round 22 of the Czech Republic Extraliga 23/24, HC Olomouc defeated HC Kometa Brno 3-1. After a 1-1 tie in the first period, Olomouc secured the victory by scoring one goal in each of the subsequent two periods.

In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Boston College Eagles defeated Harvard University 4-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-1 tie in the second, Boston College secured the win with three goals in the third period.
In round 25 of the Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season), HC Frýdek-Místek defeated HC Stadion Litoměřice 4-0, scoring consistently across all three periods.
The Abbotsford Canucks defeated the Calgary Wranglers 7-2 in an AHL 23/24 regular season game, dominating the first two periods with 3 goals each.

The Belfast Giants defeated the Nottingham Panthers 4-2 in Round 1 of the Elite League 23/24. After a 1-1 tie in the first period and a scoreless second, Belfast secured the victory with three goals in the final period.

In the 23/24 Elite League (UK Ice Hockey), the Sheffield Steelers defeated the Guildford Flames 6-2. After a competitive start with the score tied 2-2 heading into the final period, Sheffield dominated the third period with 4 goals to secure the win.
In round 22 of the German DEL 23/24 ice hockey season, the Iserlohn Roosters defeated Eisbären Berlin 3-0, scoring two goals in the first period and one in the third.
The Peterborough Petes defeated the Sudbury Wolves 5-3 in an OHL 23/24 regular season game, leading consistently across the first two periods.
In round 20 of the Swedish SHL 23/24 season, Rögle BK secured a dominant 4-0 victory over the Malmö Redhawks, scoring two goals in the first period and one in each of the subsequent two.
In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game, the Providence Friars defeated the Arizona State Sun Devils 2-1. All scoring occurred in the second period.

In round 18 of the German Oberliga Nord 23/24 season, EHC Erfurt defeated Fuchse Duisburg 4-3. After trailing 1-0 in the first period and tying 3-3 by the end of the second, Erfurt secured the win with two goals in the third period.
In a QMJHL 23/24 regular season game, the Halifax Mooseheads defeated the Moncton Wildcats 4-0, scoring consistently across all three periods.
In round 22 of the Czech Republic's Ice Hockey Extraliga (23/24 season), HC Motor České Budějovice defeated HC Verva Litvínov 1-0, with the deciding goal scored in the third period.
In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Miami Ohio Redhawks defeated the Mercyhurst Lakers 2-0, scoring one goal in each of the first and third periods.
In a QMJHL 23/24 regular season game, the Drummondville Voltigeurs defeated the Shawinigan Cataractes 3-1. All scoring occurred in the third period after a scoreless first and second.

In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, HK Ryazan defeated HC Chelny 3-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-0 lead for Chelny in the second, Ryazan secured the victory with three goals in the third period.

In a Czech Republic 1st Liga (Chance Liga) match for the 23/24 season, HC ZUBR Přerov defeated PSG Berani Zlín 3-2. The game was tied 2-2 after regulation time, with both teams scoring one goal each in the first two periods and none in the third; HC ZUBR Přerov ultimately secured the win via a penalty shootout.
